ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platforms the game is available on (e.g., Xbox Series, PS5, Both) */,
  "cross_gen" INTEGER /* Whether the game is cross-generation (true/false) */,
  "pc_compatible" INTEGER /* Whether the game is PC compatible (true/false) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., action, adventure, sports) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating of the game */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews */,
  "esrb_rating" TEXT /* ESRB (Entertainment Software Rating Board) rating */,
  "metacritic_score" INTEGER /* Metacritic score of the game */,
  "dlc_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloadable content (DLC) available */,
  "is_exclusive" INTEGER /* Whether the game is platform-exclusive */,
  "is_multiplayer" INTEGER /* Whether the game supports multiplayer */,
  "is_online_multiplayer" INTEGER /* Whether the game supports online multiplayer */,
  "is_singleplayer" INTEGER /* Whether the game supports singleplayer */,
  "language_support" TEXT /* JSON array to store supported languages */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's trailer */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the game's cover art */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer FOREIGN KEY ("developer") REFERENCES developers ("developer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform FOREIGN KEY ("platform") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Xbox Series, PS5, PC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the platform was released */,
  "supported_regions" TEXT /* JSON array to store supported regions */,
  "online_services" TEXT /* JSON array to store online services supported by the platform */,
  "storage_capacity" TEXT /* Storage capacity of the platform */,
  "memory_requirements" TEXT /* Memory requirements for games on the platform */,
  "processor_requirements" TEXT /* Processor requirements for games on the platform */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the platform */,
  "controller_types" TEXT /* JSON array to store supported controller types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., action, adventure, sports) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre classification) */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the developer was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the developer's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the developer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "is_free_to_play" INTEGER /* Whether the game is free to play on the platform */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the game on the platform */,
  "discount" REAL /* Current discount percentage */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game on the platform */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game on the platform */,
  "download_size" TEXT /* Download size of the game on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, publisher, media analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array to store user permissions */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to (e.g., development, publishing, analytics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
